name: sdlc-workflow
description: AI-assisted SDLC workflow skills for planning features and implementing tasks with full Jira traceability.

skills.name: plan-feature
skills.description: Generate an implementation plan and Jira tasks from a Jira feature and Figma mockups.

skills.name: implement-task
skills.description: Implement a Jira task by reading its structured description, modifying code, running tests, and updating Jira.
